message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle

actor "User" as User
rectangle "Frontend" {
}
rectangle "Clerk" {
    box ReservationService
    box TicketRepository
    box EventBus <<interface>>
}
rectangle "TicketMaster" {
    box TicketMasterService
    box TicketMasterRepository
    box OrderManager
}
database DB

User -> Frontend: reserve button
note right of User
POST /reservations
{
  tickets: [
    {
      programId: 1,
      sectorId: 1,
      seatId: 5
    },
    {
      programId: 1,
      sectorId: 1,
      seatId: 6
    }
  ]
}
end note

Frontend -> ReservationService: POST /reservations
activate ReservationService
ReservationService -->> TicketRepository: validate tickets
TicketRepository --> ReservationService

alt [invalid]
  ReservationService --> Frontend: ReservationRejected: code, reason
else [valid]
  note right of ReservationService
CreateReservation {
  reservation: {
    reservationId: "abc123"
    tickets: [
      {
        programId: 1,
        sectorId: 1,
        seatId: 5
      },
      {
        programId: 1,
        sectorId: 1,
        seatId: 6
      }
    ]
  }
}
  end note
  ReservationService <-[hidden]: createReservationCommand
  ReservationService -[hidden]> EventBus: publish CreateReservation
  ReservationService --> Frontend: ReservationAccepted: reservationId
end
deactivate ReservationService

EventBus -[hidden]> TicketMasterService: handle CreateReservation
activate TicketMasterService
TicketMasterService -->> TicketMasterRepository: check if all tickets are FREE
TicketMasterRepository --> TicketMasterService

alt [ticket status = FREE]
  TicketMasterService -->> TicketMasterRepository: set status of tickets to RESERVED
  TicketMasterRepository --> TicketMasterService
  TicketMasterService -[hidden]> EventBus: publish ReservationAccepted
else [ticket status != FREE]
  TicketMasterService -[hidden]> EventBus: publish ReservationRejected
end
deactivate TicketMasterService

EventBus -[hidden]> ReservationService: handle ReservationEvent
activate ReservationService
alt [ReservationAccepted]
  ReservationService -->> TicketRepository: set status of tickets to RESERVED
  TicketRepository --> ReservationService
else [ReservationRejected]
  ReservationService <-[hidden]: Noop
end
deactivate ReservationService

ReservationService -[hidden]> Frontend: publish ReservationEvent on websocket
alt [ReservationAccepted]
  Frontend --> User: redirect user to Order page
else [ReservationRejected]
  Frontend --> User: show error msg
end

EventBus -[hidden]> OrderManager: handle ReservationAccepted
activate OrderManager
OrderManager -->> DB: save ReservedTicket object for each ticket
deactivate OrderManager

@enduml
```
